segments.text: It's like whether to come out early or shield up
segments.original_text: 早出しするかガードするかっていう感じなんですけど

segments.text: Really carefully holding shield and dropping shield over and over
segments.original_text: 結構入念にガード張りっぱだったりガード解除だったりを繰り返して

segments.text: Being very careful to avoid getting hit
segments.original_text: 結構当たらないように注意してますね

segments.text: Forcing it and getting hit is the most dangerous thing
segments.original_text: 無理に行って当たるのが一番危ないんで

segments.text: Not forcing things—that's a thoroughly low-risk approach
segments.original_text: 無理をしないといいますか徹底したローリスク

segments.text: Dash shield, dash shield, inching forward step by step
segments.original_text: ダッシュガードダッシュガードで地道に詰めていく形

segments.text: That's how solid this shield defense is
segments.original_text: このガードの硬さなんですよね

segments.text: Patience and striking when you find your opening
segments.original_text: 我慢強さとそして行けるところで行く

full_text: It's like whether to come out early or shield up. Really carefully holding shield and dropping shield over and over. Being very careful to avoid getting hit. Forcing it and getting hit is the most dangerous thing. Not forcing things—that's a thoroughly low-risk approach. Dash shield, dash shield, inching forward step by step. That's how solid this shield defense is. Patience and striking when you find your opening
